display_name: Storage accounts should use customer-managed keys for encryption at rest
description: PLACEHOLDER built-in policy (not a real Azure GUID). Audit storage accounts that do not use customer-managed keys for encryption.

display_name: Resource logs should be enabled and sent to a Log Analytics workspace
description: PLACEHOLDER built-in policy. Audit resources without diagnostic logging configured.

display_name: App Service apps should only be accessible over HTTPS
description: PLACEHOLDER built-in policy. Audit web apps not enforcing HTTPS. (Noise for the demo.)
